name: Molinos Juan Semino S.A.
summary: Molinos Juan Semino S.A. produces and exports grains and byproducts in Argentina. The company offers flours, gluten, native and modified starches, dextrins, proteins, and pre mixes, as well as byproducts, such as algocol A, acetilated cotton, algocol C, starch A plus, starch A, starch AB, acetilated starch, low humidity starch, starch hydrociclone, starch injection, rusted starch, pregelatinized starch, sanitized starch, dextrines, gluten alvol and protogel, flour 0000 fresh pasta, flour 0000, flour 000 baker, flour mas pan sandwich, flour plus bread, and pandulcera meal. Its products are used in the food, refrigeration, textile, paper, oil, and other industries. The company exports its products to various countries, including Brazil, Chile, Bolivia, Uruguay, Paraguay, Ecuador, Peru, the United States, Japan, China, Malaysia, Taiwan, Thailand, Hong Kong, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Russia, and others. Molinos Juan Semino S.A. was founded in 1865 and is based in Carcara√É¬±√É¬°, Argentina.
